title: Contending with the Pandemic, Wealthy Nations Wage Global Battle for Migrants
content: Covid kept many people in place. Now several developed countries, facing aging labor forces and worker shortages, are racing to recruit, train and integrate foreigners.

more_info.byline: By Damien Cave and Christopher F. Schuetze

en_title: Contending with the Pandemic, Wealthy Nations Wage Global Battle for Migrants
en_content: Covid kept many people in place. Now several developed countries, facing aging labor forces and worker shortages, are racing to recruit, train and integrate foreigners.

title: ‘Vaccinated, Recovered or Dead’: Europe Fights Covid Wave — and Itself
content: Europe is again at the center of the pandemic, and amid vaccine resistance and protests, nations are imposing new rules and pressuring people to get inoculated.
en_title: ‘Vaccinated, Recovered or Dead’: Europe Fights Covid Wave — and Itself
en_content: Europe is again at the center of the pandemic, and amid vaccine resistance and protests, nations are imposing new rules and pressuring people to get inoculated.

title: Trying to Blur Memories of the Gulag, Russia Targets a Rights Group
content: Prosecutors are trying to shut down Memorial International, Russia’s most prominent human rights group, as the Kremlin moves to control the historical narrative of the Soviet Union.

des_facet: Human Rights and Human Rights Violations

en_title: Trying to Blur Memories of the Gulag, Russia Targets a Rights Group
en_content: Prosecutors are trying to shut down Memorial International, Russia’s most prominent human rights group, as the Kremlin moves to control the historical narrative of the Soviet Union.

title: Burning Bus Crashes in Bulgaria; Dozens Dead, Including Children
content: The bus, which had Macedonian plates, caught fire on a highway on the way back from a trip to Istanbul, officials said.

more_info.byline: By Boryana Dzhambazova and Livia Albeck-Ripka

en_title: Burning Bus Crashes in Bulgaria; Dozens Dead, Including Children
en_content: The bus, which had Macedonian plates, caught fire on a highway on the way back from a trip to Istanbul, officials said.

title: Student Sentenced as Hong Kong Uses Security Law to Clamp Down on Speech
content: Tony Chung, a 20-year-old student activist, is the youngest to be sent to prison under the harsh and expansive new security law passed in 2020.
en_title: Student Sentenced as Hong Kong Uses Security Law to Clamp Down on Speech
en_content: Tony Chung, a 20-year-old student activist, is the youngest to be sent to prison under the harsh and expansive new security law passed in 2020.

title: Italy Frees Convicted Killer of U.K. Student Meredith Kercher
content: Rudy Guede had served 13 years of a 16-year sentence for the 2007 murder. Another student, Amanda Knox, was eventually exonerated in what became a polarizing case.
en_title: Italy Frees Convicted Killer of U.K. Student Meredith Kercher
en_content: Rudy Guede had served 13 years of a 16-year sentence for the 2007 murder. Another student, Amanda Knox, was eventually exonerated in what became a polarizing case.

en_title: As Virus Cases Rise in Europe, an Economic Toll Returns
en_content: A series of restrictions, including a lockdown in Austria, is expected to put a brake on economic growth.

title: Chun Doo-hwan, Ex-Military Dictator in South Korea, Dies at 90
content: The country’s most vilified former military dictator, he seized power in a coup and ruled his country with an iron fist for most of the 1980s.
en_title: Chun Doo-hwan, Ex-Military Dictator in South Korea, Dies at 90
en_content: The country’s most vilified former military dictator, he seized power in a coup and ruled his country with an iron fist for most of the 1980s.

title: How Peng Shuai Went From ‘Chinese Princess’ to Silenced #MeToo Accuser

title: Europe’s death toll from Covid will exceed 2 million by spring, the W.H.O. says.
content: Covid is now the leading cause of death in Europe, the W.H.O. said in a statement, with almost 4,200 new deaths a day, double the number at the end of September.
en_title: Europe’s death toll from Covid will exceed 2 million by spring, the W.H.O. says.
